subcodes.first_line: Glory be to God! Tyranny and hatred have reached such a station that description and interpretation fall short of their mention; forbearance is the cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله ظلم و بغضا بمقامی رسیده که وصف و تاویل از ذکرش منقطع بردباری سبب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for tests and difficulties, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection, @law of fasting
